item.title: The 482nd vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps - SPOOPY SEASON, Week 3 -- Witches and other Wonderful Women! ep 2
item.description:
I added a a bunch to this one
This
Ow
Call a priest and say "We don't need you anymore"
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild *every other* Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever I post or one of my dumps goes Viral. If you wish to chat, I'm frequently in ElbowDeepInAHorse and PotatoCheesMonk's Discord Servers between the hours of 7pm and 1am GMT-5 during the week, and at unpredictable but frequent times Saturdays and Sundays
Videos Incoming! 3 of them, spaced 2 MeeMays apart so they don't try to load over each other.
I never did find out who this group is. Hell of a lot of talent. Comment below if you know. EDIT: The band is Broken Peach
VERY Interested
Would
Stupid Sexy Wizards! (Not sure who this is either)
SEXY WITCHES, TOO?!
God I wish that were me in the cauldron
@Kaeldra IT YE! (Spooky Lady) IT ME! (Pet Dragon)
This had an outraged conservative man's comment below it when I stole it.
Well, as long as it's an EQUAL volume
Rough way to learn about consent
I'm 1, 3 and 5
Fall speed. It says it can't be BELOW zero. Some of the best paying and coolest jobs involve extreme heights. OR Dream Influence. Terrorize those Billionaires.
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @JebidiahBeetus @Kaeldra @KirbyVictorious @HermioneDanger00 @DumpReview @WhiskeyJelly @JasonPositivityPilot @danat101 @PotatoCheesMonk @VanessaNelson @NotMuchBiggerThanAWomprat @MindNumbingBraIncAndy @TheMellowMoron @TheWoodsAreVile @ThatOtherGirlYouKnow @IStealMemesAndStuff @DrWalters @DaymanAhAAAAah @SecretHarpy Lemme know If you are a Regular Dumper and would like to be added to the list! Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq -----FRESHLY UPDATED----- #Spooky #Spoopy #Memes #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple #GregFromHR #SteveFromAccounting #DougFromSales

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Tuesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
no thanks
fair
accurate
again
looks painful
mfers do be saying that
now there's an idea
i didnt crop the price out.. think its $1,225.00 - seems reasonable
let's go
this is dedicated to my haterz
over share much?
i have absolutely zero idea what that is supposed to mean
no
mmm hmm
pigeon nest, obviously
i like this for some reason
that's my set.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Things seen this week during structural assessments!
item.description:
Cracks wider than 1/4th of an inch in a foundation are a major concern. This one extends well beyond that size and shows signs of differential movement. It’s definitely time to address the structural issues and begin repair.
Another contractor was hired to do a pipe and board project for this client. It failed last year. This photo was taken after their attempt to "fix" it.
We can confidently say it’s only a matter of time before it fails again if it’s not properly repaired.
Long horizontal foundation cracks are a clear sign of structural issues. Here, you can also see significant rust and spall damage, which only weaken the foundation further if all damaged areas are not demolished and replaced.
This section of the foundation shows even more severe spall damage. The wall has delaminated, exposing corroded rebar beneath the surface. Without proper repair, this deterioration will only continue to compromise the foundation’s integrity.
This historic home has support pillars made of river rock; a method used in some homes built before 1920. Unfortunately, these rocks are not reliable for structural support. In this area of the home, the beam is simply resting on the river rock, lacking adequate support, which will only continue to shift and settle over time.
Outside of this home, tree roots have grown beneath this foundation. Over time, the pressure from the roots has caused the foundation to bow outward and fail.
After a long day of seeing way too many DIY disasters. Thank you for joining us, we hope you enjoyed! Check out our Instagram for more exciting content, and we'll see you next Tuesday at 2 pm! https://www.instagram.com/alphastructural/
item.dc:creator: AlphaStructural

item.title: Update on the battle vest
item.description:
I recently added some patches and I even got myself a bullet belt. The wife just kind of laughed and shook her head in complete confusion
Added the Century patch here. If someone's into really good newly made heavy metal you should definitely check out this band from Sweden. Really worth a listen.
